minting_now.name: Hope Not Found
minting_now.description: An abstract portrait of terminal frustration. The figure is being erased by its own surroundings, reflecting the feeling of being ignored and invalidated until nothing is left but a scream. It is the visual representation of trying everything and gaining nothing—a digital monument to the exhaustion
